title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Mahendra's Institute - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Mahendra's Institute - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Mahendra's Institute invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Curriculum Developer at our Visakhapatnam location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Mahendra's Institute:
Mahendra's Institute is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahendra's Institute!
